visual_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on an older man with short, graying hair, wearing a gray suit jacket. He is in profile, holding an old-style flip phone to his ear with his right hand while his left hand is near his mouth, as if speaking intently. The scene is dimly lit with a cool, greenish-blue color palette. In the blurred background, several other men are seated, observing the main subject. The setting appears to be an indoor space at night, with a window or grille visible behind the man. In the top left corner of the screen, there is a watermark with Chinese characters. The camera remains static, maintaining a tight focus on the man's serious expression and the phone conversation. A man speaks in a firm and commanding tone, his voice low and steady. He sounds serious and slightly impatient as he gives an order, saying, "我都听到了。你叫他大声说一次，可卡因是他的。" (I've heard everything. Tell him to say it out loud once, that the cocaine is his.) The background is quiet, with only the faint, indistinct murmur of other people in the room, creating a tense and focused atmosphere.
